description:
Features:

  • - Suitable for umbrellas with pole sizes of 1.5" or 1.9"
  • - Made of weather-resistant powder-coated metal base and pole for outdoor use
  • - 29 lbs in weight, this stand keeps your parasol secure through light rain and wind
  • - Four adjustable pads included for stable standing on uneven surfaces
  • - Include a tightening knob for securing your umbrella to the umbrella base
  • - Stylish solid surface makes for a chic accent
  • - Suitable for use in your garden, deck, poolside, or other outdoor spaces
  • - Assembly required

Specification:

  • - Color: Bronze
  • - Material: Metal
  • - Overall Dimension: 17.7" L x 17.7" W x 13.6" H
  • - Base Dimension: 17.7" L x 17.7" W x 0.3" H
  • - Pole Dimension: Φ2.2" x 9.6" H
  • - Fit Umbrella Pole Diameter: 1.5", 1.9"
  • - Net Weight: 29 lbs.
  • - Note: It is recommended to use the umbrella base with a table for a stable and reliable use.
  • - Note: Please measure your umbrella pole diameter in advance to ensure that our base can fit

Package Includes:

  • - 1 x Umbrella Base
  • - 1 x Manual
